data.title: Elon Musk Predicts Imminent Arrival of Digital Superintelligence
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Elon Musk recently shared his insights during an interview with the renowned U.S. startup incubator Y Combinator. Musk predicted that digital superintelligence is on the horizon, likely to emerge either this year or next. Despite acknowledging the associated risks, he remains optimistic about artificial intelligence, believing it could expand the economy by thousands or even millions of times its current size.

Musk also highlighted the potential dangers of AI, stressing the importance of adhering to truth and maintaining empathy for humanity. Throughout the interview, he underscored the significance of being useful and engaging in work that genuinely benefits the public.

He encouraged young engineers present to focus on solving challenging problems, such as advancing rocket technology or developing competitive AI models.

data.title: Bitcoin ETF Attracts Significant Investment Amid Market Challenges
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Matrixport's latest weekly report reveals that Bitcoin ETFs have attracted over $45 billion in investments, with stable corporate allocation demand and growing institutional interest. Despite the strong inflow into ETFs, the market faces potential hidden selling pressure, particularly when Bitcoin's price approaches the average holding cost of retail investors over the past year, approximately $45,000, which could pose resistance to further price increases.

The report also highlights that some funds that flowed into Bitcoin ETFs in the second quarter of 2024 remain at a loss. This situation may lead to continued short-term market structure adjustments. The key factor will be whether Bitcoin can break through its current range to trigger a new wave of investment.

data.title: BitMart June 20 Market Report: BTC continues to fluctuate and consolidate, while altcoins rise and fall in a differentiated manner
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to BitMart's market report on June 20, the total market value of the cryptocurrency market is about 3.25 trillion US dollars, down 0.21% from the previous day; BTC is currently priced at 104,647 USDT, down 0.29% in 24 hours. Bitcoin spot ETF has a net inflow of 389 million US dollars in a single day. Overall, Bitcoin may remain in a wide range of fluctuations in the short term, and the performance of the support and pressure levels of the range boundary can be paid attention to in the future; ETH's trend is synchronized with BTC, and the market volatility is not large. Yesterday, Ethereum spot ETF had a net inflow of 19.1 million US dollars, and ETH is currently priced at 2,532 USDT, up 0.34% in 24 hours; altcoins rose and fell, and the market lacked a collective narrative; the fear and greed index remained at 48, and the market sentiment was neutral and negative. Investors are advised to pay attention to the subsequent ETF fund flows, macroeconomic data and the rotation of altcoin funds, and beware of the risk of increased volatility.

data.title: Thailand SEC publicly solicits opinions on the listing standards of digital asset exchanges and plans to relax restrictions on the listing of related-party tokens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The Thai SEC announced the launch of a public consultation on the revised standards for listing tokens on digital asset exchanges, which will last until July 21, 2025. According to the proposal, digital asset exchanges can list "tokens or cryptocurrencies that can be used directly" issued by the exchange itself or its affiliates for blockchain transactions in the future to encourage the listing of assets that are in line with innovation and application development.
The new regulations propose to require exchanges to disclose the affiliate information of token issuers and mark risk warnings in the system to help regulators prevent insider trading. At the same time, exchanges still need to establish a regulatory mechanism for conflict of interest prevention, market manipulation and unfair trading practices. Listed tokens must supplement related information within 90 days after the rules come into effect.
This move is part of Thailand's strategy to win international crypto business and build a regional financial center. Previously, the Thai government has decided to exempt crypto trading capital gains tax for five years starting from 2024, which is expected to bring more than $30.7 million in economic benefits. The government is also promoting a pilot for crypto tourism payments in Phuket and considering opening a Bitcoin spot ETF to retail investors. (decrypt)

data.title: Avail (AVAIL) Now Live on Binance Alpha With Limited Airdrop Event
data.description: Avail (AVAIL) Now Live on Binance Alpha With Limited Airdrop EventKey Points:Avail (AVAIL) is now available on Binance Alpha as of June 19, 2025.Eligible users can claim a 2,667 AVAIL token airdrop using Binance Alpha Points.Airdrop event runs in two phases within 24 hours of listing.15 Alpha Points are required to claim; early access for users with higher point balances.Binance Alpha has officially listed Avail (AVAIL), a modular blockchain infrastructure project aimed at enhancing data availability across Layer 2 and rollup ecosystems. In celebration of the listing, Binance Alpha users can claim an exclusive AVAIL airdrop by redeeming their Alpha Points on the Alpha Event Page.AVAIL Airdrop DetailsClaim Window: Begins at AVAIL’s listing time and remains open for 24 hours.Total Claim Per User: 2,667 AVAIL tokens.Point Cost: 15 Binance Alpha Points per claim.Claim Requirement: Users must confirm the claim on the [Alpha Event Page] within 24 hours. Unclaimed entries will be forfeited.Airdrop Distribution SchedulePhase 1 (First 18 Hours)— Open to users with 243 or more Alpha Points.— Priority access to the airdrop, first come, first served.Phase 2 (Final 6 Hours)— Opens to users with at least 199 Alpha Points.— Remaining airdrop supply distributed until exhausted or event ends.Binance emphasizes that claiming is only valid if users confirm on the Alpha Event Page during the 24-hour claim period. Any unconfirmed claims will be considered forfeited.What Is Avail (AVAIL)?Avail is a modular blockchain that provides data availability infrastructure for scalable, secure Layer 2 solutions and rollups. It aims to offload data from execution layers while ensuring trust-minimized availability proofs, positioning itself as a foundational layer for the future of Ethereum-based scaling.

data.title: Binance Alpha: The first phase of the Avail airdrop requires 243 points to claim, and claiming will cost 15 points
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Binance Alpha is now online with Avail (AVAIL). Eligible users can go to the Alpha event page within 24 hours after the start of trading to claim 2,667 AVAIL tokens airdrop, which will consume 15 Alpha points.
This airdrop will be carried out in two phases: the first phase (the first 18 hours) is open to users with no less than 243 Alpha points; the second phase (the last 6 hours) is relaxed to users with 199 points to participate, first come first served, until the airdrop pool is distributed or the event ends. Users who fail to complete the claim within 24 hours will be deemed to have given up.

data.title: Matrixport: Bitcoin ETF attracts more than $45 billion, but the market faces hidden selling pressure
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Matrixport released its latest weekly report, pointing out that Bitcoin ETFs have attracted more than $45 billion in capital inflows, with stable corporate allocation demand and growing institutional interest. However, despite the strong capital absorption of ETFs, there is still a hidden selling risk in the market, especially when the price of Bitcoin is close to the average holding cost of retail investors in the past year (about $45,000), potential selling pressure is apparent, which may pose a certain resistance to the rise.
The report also pointed out that since some funds have been in a loss state since they flowed into Bitcoin ETFs in Q2 2024, the market structure adjustment may continue in the short term. The key lies in whether Bitcoin can break through the existing range and drive a new round of funds into the market.
